nodes.label: AI as tone checker for professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: I'm autistic, so I can sometimes come off as very blunt or offensive, so it helps me check that what I'm saying is not more mean than I intended

nodes.label: AI as time and stress management tool
nodes.grounding_span: It was supremely helpful, just at helping me manage my stress and keep on top of my daily tasks

nodes.label: Confidentiality in AI use
nodes.label_negative: Reckless AI use with personal data
nodes.grounding_span: due to us not knowing who can access it after we type it in we err on the side of caution

nodes.label: Thorough verification of AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: I'd like to use AI more, as long as the data we get out of it is verifiable

nodes.label: AI delegation for simple tasks
nodes.label_negative: Inflexible AI use regardless of time
nodes.grounding_span: how much I have to delegate to each task determines whether I write it myself or ask for help

nodes.label: AI as future physical assistant in embedded work
nodes.grounding_span: AI assistance with things like camera control, door opening etc would be amazing
